fn process_data(data: &[u8]) {
    if let Ok(text) = std::str::from_utf8(data) {
        process_text(text);
    }
}

fn validate_once(items: &[&str]) -> Vec<&str> {
    items.iter().copied().filter(|s| s.is_ascii()).collect()
}

fn filter_valid_utf8(chunks: &[Vec<u8>]) -> Vec<String> {
    chunks
        .iter()
        .filter_map(|chunk| String::from_utf8(chunk.clone()).ok())
        .collect()
}

fn process_known_utf8(text: &str) {
    process_text(text);
}

fn process_text(_text: &str) {}
